peak_burst.description: 254 error-level entries logged in 11 seconds. Error types during this window: 115× file_not_found, 70× mod_jk_noise, 69× script_not_found. Top source IP was 202.133.98.6 with 184 hits (appears to be a scanner/attacker). This is a mass-vulnerability scan / worm probe from 202.133.98.6, hammering AWStats and CGI paths (115 awstats hits, 115 cgi-related hits). The flood triggered repeated mod_jk child spawn/respawn failures (70 jk errors) and a cascade of 'mod_jk2 Shutting down' notices immediately after, indicating the attack load caused worker processes to die off and restart en masse.
